tools.name: BEACON
tools.evidence_snippet: BEACON remains the most frequently observed malware family in Mandiant investigations globally, appearing in 10 percent of cases.

tools.name: ALPHV
tools.evidence_snippet: ALPHV ransomware was identified in 5% of Mandiant led investigations in 2023.

ttps.evidence_snippet: T1566 Phishing 16.3% was identified among the top ATT&CK techniques in Mandiant investigations during 2023.

summary: This report shares insights from Bridewell CTI's malicious infrastructure tracking program and intelligence gathered by their Security Operations Centre (SOC) and Managed Detection & Response (MDR) services.

timeline.evidence_snippet: Earliest evidence of exploitation of CVE-2023-34362 occurred on May 27, 2023, when threat actors began targeting MOVEit Transfer installations.
